title: BatallaOS is the complete digital operating system for Batalla & Associates
summary: BatallaOS is not merely a website, CRM, case tracker, document repository, billing tool, or AI chatbot. It is the complete digital operating system for Batalla & Associates, organized around the Case Management Core and designed for an old-school law office where every important action is understandable, printable, auditable, and lawyer-controlled.
supersedes: Any earlier plan that treats the project primarily as a public website
Any earlier plan that treats the project as a website plus CRM
Any earlier plan that treats AI as the product rather than a controlled supporting layer
Any architecture where cases, documents, hearings, billing, calendar, knowledge, paper files, marketing, and reporting live as disconnected modules

canonical_identity.definition: The complete digital operating system for Batalla & Associates

operating_philosophy: Easy enough for an old-school lawyer and secretary
Faster than the equivalent paper process
Safer and more traceable than paper
Every operationally important view is printable
Nothing legally important is filed, sent, approved, signed, deleted, or decided automatically
Paper and digital records must reconcile
Every queue has an owner, next action, due date, and history
No hard deletion of legal or financial records; use archive, void, supersede, or revoke states
Role-specific simplicity is preferred over generic feature-heavy dashboards

executive_command_center.purpose: Atty. Batalla's desk in software form
executive_command_center.standard: He must be able to understand whether the office is under control in under two minutes
questions: What hearings and deadlines are coming?
Are there urgent or overdue items?
How many qualified inquiries arrived this week?

first_class_modules: Physical Paper Folder and QR Tracking
ai_rules: Always request approval for significant legal actions
delivery_order: Security foundation: authentication, MFA, staff membership, suspension, offboarding and revocation
Tasks, hearings, deadlines, office calendar and printing
Physical folder QR and custody tracking
Reputation archive and long-term public history

current_project_state.production_public_site: Live on Vercel from the Battle repository main branch
current_project_state.epic_001: Complete: deterministic CI, unit tests, Playwright, Supabase RLS tests and production deployment
current_project_state.active_epic: EPIC-002 Auth, MFA and staff membership hardening

drift_guard: Future planning, coding, design, reporting and AI assistance must treat BatallaOS as the governing product architecture. Do not revert to describing or designing it as merely a website, CRM, chatbot, or disconnected collection of modules.

source.conversation_context: User explicitly approved BatallaOS as the complete digital operating system and requested that Pandora Memory be updated to prevent drift.
